overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a vibrant cyberpunk city with neon signage, palm trees, and futuristic architecture. The character moves from a covered sidewalk through an open intersection and into a neon-lit covered walkway with vending machines and food stalls.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial sidewalk with a large 'PEACH WATER' building on the left. Palm trees line the path and pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The futuristic city skyline rises in the background under an overcast sky.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a wide open intersection with red paved crosswalks. Digital billboard poles display advertisements in the center while a large glass dome structure dominates the background. The camera crosses the street as vehicles wait at the traffic light.

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered underpass with a striking green glowing circular structure overhead. The lighting shifts to artificial neon as the camera passes vending machines and trash bags along the left wall. Groups of pedestrians walk ahead through the enclosed walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: food court area with pink neon counter and elevated walkways

segments.scene_description: Arriving at a food court area featuring a prominent pink neon-lit counter where people sit on stools. The covered walkway continues with an elevated blue structure visible overhead. The lighting shifts from green to vibrant pink as the camera approaches the food service area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling commercial sidewalk into the neon-drenched depths of a futuristic food court. It begins under a covered walkway beside a large Peach Water building, moving past palm trees and pedestrians toward a distant city skyline under an overcast sky. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a wide intersection with red paved crosswalks and digital billboards, crossing the street toward a massive glass dome structure. The environment then shifts into a covered underpass, where natural light is replaced by an artificial green glow from a circular overhead structure and the presence of vending machines. Finally, the lighting transitions from green to vibrant pink as the camera enters a food court area, passing an elevated blue structure to arrive at a neon-lit service counter.
